127908.explanation: Quality is more important than gender in a small executive board.

127909.explanation: Good participation is very important and must be guaranteed, but a referendum is not necessary.

127910.explanation: Zoeterwoude has an active community. If residents are interested in taking over such tasks, it not only contributes to mutual involvement but also strengthens social cohesion. The municipality will need to continue supporting (for example with subsidies, advice, or resources) and monitoring how it's going. Good agreements must be made about this. If necessary, the task can revert to the municipality if residents no longer want or are able to do it.

127913.explanation: The sustainability fund has proven to be very suitable for this.

127914.explanation: Not applicable to our business parks.

127920.explanation: We are too small for that.

127923.explanation: This is part of doing business.

127924.explanation: Within the rules of the zoning plan.

127929.explanation: Under conditions and depending on the reason why the difficulties arose.

127931.explanation: The current formation was just expanded and should be sufficient.

127932.explanation: Not an issue in our rural municipality.

127940.explanation: Municipal taxes are a heavy burden for the lowest incomes. By waiving these charges, they have more money available for their daily expenses. This concerns a relatively small group within our municipality who can really use our support and help in this area.

127944.explanation: We want to improve road safety in the built-up area by lowering the speed (and enforcing it) where this is not yet the case.

127945.explanation: But a small municipality like ours cannot offer that in all directions, so that will possibly be in another municipality.

127947.explanation: The property tax is a source of income that we as a municipality cannot do without. We cannot afford to reduce it, as that would come at the expense of amenities.

127949.explanation: Just introduced, first evaluate whether it yields enough compared to the management costs.

127951.explanation: We are satisfied with the current arrangement.

127953.explanation: Who pollutes, pays. So the current policy is good.

127957.explanation: According to regional policy, it must be at least 30%, while we believe it should be at least 35%. The current social housing stock is lower, so preferably more should be built.

127958.explanation: Where it fits in the environment, like in Verde Vista. Not in the 'old' centers.

127959.explanation: We are against house sharing but not against splitting large buildings into multiple independent housing units, provided this does not negatively impact the livability of the area.

127961.explanation: Strange statement. Haasbroek is not that big.

127908.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude finds the quality and competence of the college members important. That is paramount.

127909.explanation: For very important issues, CDA Zoeterwoude is in favor of an advisory referendum.

127913.explanation: From the national government, there are already various national incentive measures.

127914.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude stands for a good business climate. Suitable locations must be well considered.

127916.explanation: As much as possible. The scarce rental homes must be available as much as possible to local home seekers such as young people.

127920.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude supports the youth association's initiative for annual carbide shooting. CDA Zoeterwoude also sees opportunities for centralized fireworks (this will need to be investigated).

127923.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude believes the municipality can help entrepreneurs with that. This does not have to be with money but can also be, for example, advice.

127924.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude is not opposed in principle. However, it must fit within the environmental vision/policy.

127926.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude does not find extra money necessary. The local broadcaster already receives a subsidy from the municipality.

127929.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude believes financial contributions to sports clubs are not a core task of the municipality. However, CDA Zoeterwoude believes the municipality should support sports clubs where it can.

127931.explanation: Civil enforcement officers contribute to safety, both preventively and repressively. However, according to the 'Zoeterwoude' standards, where dialogue takes priority.

127932.explanation: For the municipality's access roads for the prevention and detection of crime such as burglaries and thefts.

127937.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude understands that distressing situations sometimes require a practical solution. To be considered on a case-by-case basis.

127940.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude believes the situation must be looked at. Waiving charges requires careful consideration.

127941.explanation: Life has become increasingly expensive. CDA Zoeterwoude sees that workers with relatively low incomes also have difficulty paying for everything.

127944.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude finds safety for vulnerable road users such as cyclists (school children, seniors) important.

127945.explanation: Care is unfortunately not a luxury. Public care offered by the municipality is not a menu of choices.

127947.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude supports a minimal annual increase in property tax.

127949.explanation: Tourists use municipal facilities in Zoeterwoude and may reasonably pay something for it.

127951.explanation: CDA is not in favor of fewer shopping Sundays. However, CDA wants to critically consider whether opening on, for example, Christmas Day is necessary.

127953.explanation: It is already not expensive at the waste bring station. CDA Zoeterwoude believes the bring station should be open more often on Saturdays.

127957.explanation: Zoeterwoude is originally a rural municipality. A comparison with a city is not valid. By creating more supply, including affordable owner-occupied homes, turnover is promoted and houses become more affordable, which is crucial for working young people.

127958.explanation: CDA wants to build but no high residential flats. These do not fit the rural character of the municipality.

127961.explanation: CDA Zoeterwoude believes there is sufficient greenery around sports park Haasbroek.

127908.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude considers diversity very important. We therefore strive for a balanced composition of the municipal executive, where diversity contributes to better decision-making.

127909.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude attaches great importance to involving residents in new plans to reach careful decision-making. We weigh interests by engaging in conversations with, and actively listening to residents and organizations. This is how we want to realize participation.

127910.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude wants to give space to initiatives from residents. We welcome it when people take responsibility. It is important to assess on a case-by-case basis what can and cannot be asked of residents. It is crucial that a good and financially substantiated plan is in place.

127913.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude chooses a feasible and affordable energy transition. We support local initiatives with backing from residents that contribute to sustainable energy.

127914.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude opts for oversight on spatial development. We evaluate each location to see if business activities fit the character of the village and economic opportunities. If new business activities are developed, this can create space for new entrepreneurs and more jobs for Zoeterwoude.

127916.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude believes employers should primarily provide adequate housing for their temporary workers themselves.

127920.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude does not see this as a core task of the municipality.

127923.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude values accessibility. Entrepreneurs themselves are responsible for making their businesses accessible. If this is not feasible for an entrepreneur, we should investigate whether support from the municipality is possible.

127924.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude stands for perspective for agricultural entrepreneurs. We believe they should have the option to use their farm for other functions, such as residential or care purposes. Such a change of function must fit with the landscape and the village.

127926.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude finds local media important. As a municipality, we receive an amount for the local broadcaster, which we pass on and which should be sufficient.

127929.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude supports strong sports clubs. We believe the municipality should be able to support sports clubs when necessary, but always temporarily, within reasonable limits and without taking over the clubs' responsibilities.

127931.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude finds safety and visible enforcement important. We have already deployed extra enforcement and assume this is sufficient.

127932.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude opts for tailored safety measures. We want to use camera surveillance where necessary, targeted and temporary, to tackle nuisance and insecurity.

127937.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude chooses appropriate and safe housing solutions. Holiday homes, such as those on campgrounds, are not suitable for permanent residence and do not solve the housing shortage.

127940.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude considers it important to help those who cannot afford it themselves. We provide support to residents with low incomes by continuing to allow exemptions.

127941.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude opts for targeted support. We determine what is needed on a case-by-case basis, as we have previously done with a temporary measure: the energy allowance.

127944.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude advocates traffic safety with customization. We apply 30 km/h limits where possible and desired, but also keep an eye on accessibility and traffic flow.

127945.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude finds it important that residents receive the care they need. That is the first priority. When possible, we take wishes and backgrounds into account.

127947.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude wants to handle municipal funds carefully. The property tax is necessary to finance municipal facilities and tasks, but should not be higher than necessary to keep the burden on residents and entrepreneurs as low as possible.

127949.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude chooses an attractive business climate. A low tourist tax helps support recreation and local entrepreneurs.

127951.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude supports entrepreneurial freedom and personal responsibility. Entrepreneurs should be able to decide for themselves when to open their stores.

127953.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude opts for a fair and transparent waste system in which the polluter pays. If waste disposal at the recycling center were free, the costs would be distributed through fixed charges over all residents and the incentive to produce less waste would disappear.

127957.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude aims for enough affordable housing. We strive for at least 30% social rental housing as agreed in the region.

127958.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude believes that housing construction must fit the village character of Zoeterwoude. High residential towers do not fit here.

127959.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude sees opportunities in better utilizing existing homes. Subdividing housing can contribute to co-living for young and old, extra income and company for the elderly, and more housing for young people.

127961.explanation: VVD Zoeterwoude is open to multifunctional use of sports facilities. We first check if there is a need for this.

127908.explanation: ZZV stands for quality governance regardless of background, not based on gender.

127909.explanation: ZZV wants to give Zoeterwoude residents a voice. A referendum is a good instrument for this, provided it is not exploited for political purposes.

127913.explanation: ZZV supports private initiatives in sustainability and supports existing schemes. In ZZV's view, no additional funds need to be allocated for this.

127914.explanation: Development is possible within the existing industrial areas.

127916.explanation: As far as known, Zoeterwoude has no housing for seasonal workers. Should seasonal workers come to Zoeterwoude, we must care for them properly. ZZV encourages housing seasonal workers on private land but insists there should be no coercion.

127920.explanation: Our villages are too far apart for an (affordable) fireworks show. We uphold the tradition of shooting carbide.

127923.explanation: It is not a municipality's task to financially assist entrepreneurs. We do want to support businesses where possible with, for example, advice and permit services.

127924.explanation: Customization in addressing the housing shortage should be possible, but we will preserve the characteristic Zoeterwoude landscape.

127926.explanation: Provided all municipalities contribute proportionally and the broadcaster also contributes to Zoeterwoude.

127929.explanation: Sports clubs contribute to the livability in Zoeterwoude. However, ZZV also values self-reliance. Assistance to become financially healthy is allowed, but the initiative lies with the clubs themselves.

127931.explanation: ZZV does believe that more police deployment is desirable.

127932.explanation: ZZV continues to commit to a Zoeterwoude where camera surveillance is not necessary.

127937.explanation: Due to the housing shortage, permanent residence in holiday homes can temporarily provide a solution. It gives people a residential address and prevents additional (financial) problems. However, this must be temporary, because recreational parks are not intended as residential neighborhoods. Additionally, we want to prevent price increases.

127940.explanation: Every case is different, however. ZZV wants our municipality to handle each case individually.

127941.explanation: Indexation should be according to the cost of living.

127944.explanation: ZZV stands for a safe environment for our children, youth, and elderly. Many zones within the built-up area already have a 30 km/h speed limit.

127945.explanation: Healthcare is under pressure. ZZV does not want to burden the system further with unnecessary requirements. In the Netherlands, healthcare is provided within our prevailing norms and values; this must remain leading.

127947.explanation: ZZV is in favor of tax relief.

127949.explanation: Tourists contribute to the livability of Zoeterwoude. ZZV wants to retain tourists. A higher tourist tax does not directly benefit the residents of Zoeterwoude or Zoeterwoude tourism.

127951.explanation: ZZV opposes any further extension of Sunday shopping hours. ZZV sees the value of Sunday rest but also recognizes that the 24-hour economy is difficult to reverse.

127953.explanation: Disposing of waste costs money. We will cover that together.

127957.explanation: We build according to the housing demand in Zoeterwoude, not according to a national requirement.

127958.explanation: Zoeterwoude already has apartment buildings. New apartments should be possible, provided they fit in the environment.

127959.explanation: The housing shortage is such that this is a good (temporary) solution.

127961.explanation: Haasbroek is for the sports clubs established there. There are enough other places to walk.

127908.explanation: It is more important to have the right person in the right place than to look at gender or background.

127909.explanation: It is always good to know what the residents of Zoeterwoude want on a specific issue. A consultative referendum is an excellent means for that.

127910.explanation: However, cooperation between the municipality and residents is an even better option.

127913.explanation: Of course, it is important that our municipality supports sustainable collectives. However, that does not always have to be financial support.

127914.explanation: Not applicable. If it means a lot of greenery is lost by placing a distribution center, we would be against it.

127916.explanation: If good housing can be provided close to the company, that would also be good for us. However, we do believe any nuisance must be resolved by, or at least with, the employer.

127920.explanation: If necessary, the municipality can support the initiators organizationally and financially.

127923.explanation: When it comes to helping people find a job or helping employees keep their jobs.

127924.explanation: If it concerns a home for their own children or parents, then absolutely! No large-scale housing construction and fitting in the landscape.

127926.explanation: The municipality already contributes money to the local broadcaster.

127929.explanation: The association must be viable. There must also be support for this association.

127931.explanation: The two BOA’s (special enforcement officers) we currently have could certainly be more visible.

127932.explanation: Camera surveillance must be targeted and applied only when necessary.

127937.explanation: Given the current housing shortage, we cannot disagree. However, livability must be monitored and exploitation and overcrowding, for example by labor migrants, must be prevented.

127940.explanation: When people get into debt, they often get further into trouble. By preventing debt, they can keep their head above water.

127941.explanation: Everything has become more expensive. By sticking to the lowest incomes and not considering expenses, people can end up in poverty and debt.

127944.explanation: Speed is an important factor; however, it is more important that unsafe situations are addressed. Thinking this can be solved with a quick fix does not seem wise to us.

127945.explanation: It is not the municipality’s role to choose the healthcare provider.

127947.explanation: Homeownership should be taxed as little as possible. The total tax burden on citizens and businesses must be as low as possible.

127949.explanation: Zoeterwoude must remain attractive to tourists.

127951.explanation: It is up to the entrepreneur whether to open or close their doors on Sunday.

127953.explanation: Waste streams that the municipality can dispose of (almost) free of charge should be or remain free. However, the more expensive waste streams will have to be paid for.

127957.explanation: In larger housing projects, social housing must definitely be included. This can be social rental homes but also, for example, partly affordable owner-occupied homes for starters. It is important to bring the total number of social rental homes to 30%.

127958.explanation: High-rise buildings do not fit the character of Zoeterwoude. Verde Vista is an exception due to its location.

127959.explanation: To prevent more people than intended from living in one home and causing extra nuisance, for example due to increased parking pressure, we do not find it desirable to allow this.

127961.explanation: Sportpark Haasbroek, and also Sportpark Meerburg, should be a pleasant place to stay. So lots of greenery, play opportunities, and walking paths.

statements.title: Sportpark Haasbroek should be at least 30% publicly accessible with walking paths, play areas, and green spaces.
Employers in agriculture and horticulture should provide housing for seasonal workers on their own premises.

titleParts.text: Werkgevers in de land- en tuinbouw moeten zelf zorgen voor de huisvesting van

titleParts.glossary: People who do work that only takes place during certain seasons, often in agriculture and fruit picking.

statements.title: Residents should be able to take over the management of, for example, a sports hall or a public green space from the municipality.
At least 28% of the newly built homes in Zoeterwoude should be social rental housing. Currently, 28% of homes in the Netherlands are social rental housing.

titleParts.text: Van de nieuw te bouwen woningen in Zoeterwoude moet minimaal 28% een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent for people with a low income. In 2026 that is at most €932.93 per month.

titleParts.text: zijn. In Nederland is nu 28% van de woningen een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent for people with a low income. In 2026 that is at most €932.93 per month.

statements.title: Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: Zoeterwoude should have more camera surveillance.

titleParts.glossary: Monitoring of a building, area, or (groups of) people using security cameras.

statements.title: The new college of mayor and aldermen must have an equal number of men and women.

titleParts.glossary: The college of mayor and aldermen, the municipality’s executive board.
The mayor leads the municipality and chairs the municipal council. The mayor is not elected but appointed by the national government, after recommendation by the municipal council.

titleParts.text: en wethouders moet het aantal mannen en vrouwen gelijk zijn.

statements.title: High-rise residential buildings should be allowed in Zoeterwoude.
Zoeterwoude should have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) who focus on public safety.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: The maximum speed limit in built-up areas should be set to 30 km/h.

titleParts.glossary: The maximum speed that cars and motorcycles are allowed to drive on the road.
An area with buildings (houses, other structures).

statements.title: It should be possible for farmers to build houses themselves on their land.
The municipality must oppose the establishment of new distribution centers.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de vestiging van nieuwe

titleParts.glossary: Large warehouses where goods are received, sorted and transported to other locations.

statements.title: The property tax (onroerendezaakbelasting, OZB) should be reduced.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.
Property tax. Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

statements.title: The municipality should financially help business owners to make their buildings accessible to people with disabilities.

titleParts.glossary: Something related to money.

titleParts.text: helpen om hun gebouw toegankelijker te maken voor mensen met een

titleParts.glossary: Something that limits you in daily life. A disability can be physical or intellectual or relate to hearing or sight, or combinations of these.

statements.title: The tourist tax should be increased.

titleParts.glossary: The tax you must pay when you stay overnight in a hotel or at a campsite.

statements.title: The municipality must allow holiday homes to be used as a permanent residence.
The municipality should support the local broadcaster with additional funding.

titleParts.glossary: Radio and television by and for people from the municipality and the immediate area.

statements.title: People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: If sports clubs are struggling, the municipality should contribute financially.

titleParts.text: Als sportverenigingen het moeilijk hebben, moet de gemeente

titleParts.glossary: Something related to money.

statements.title: The municipality must allow fewer Sunday shopping days.
The municipality should raise the income threshold for receiving poverty assistance.
The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.
The municipality should allow landlords to rent out individual rooms instead of entire houses.
The municipality should stop forgiving municipal taxes for low-income residents.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet stoppen met het

titleParts.glossary: That people no longer have to pay for something.
Taxes you have to pay to the municipality (e.g., sewer charge, waste disposal charge, dog tax).

titleParts.text: voor inwoners met een laag inkomen.

statements.title: Dropping off waste at the recycling center should be free of charge.

titleParts.text: Het inleveren van afval bij de

titleParts.glossary: A place where citizens and businesses can bring different kinds of waste.

statements.title: The residents of Zoeterwoude should be able to express their opinion on important issues via a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Zoeterwoude moeten over belangrijke onderwerpen hun mening kunnen geven via een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.
